objective: List every installable file that still references the legacy wire contract.
acceptance: Return only findings relevant to the protocol reset.
context: The new protocol keeps only ticket-dispatch/1 and ticket-result/1.

objective: Rewrite the installable schema files to the new two-file contract.
acceptance: Only the new schema ids remain under multi-agent/schemas/.
constraints: Do not touch runtime config files.
context: Broker owns salvage and follow-up ticket creation.

objective: Review the rewritten protocol for scope compliance.
acceptance: Return pass, block, or needs_evidence against the reset contract.
context: The broker, not the worker, owns review ordering.
